name: @stackra/consent
purpose: Client-side GDPR/CCPA consent — categories, reactive preferences, pluggable storage adapters, React hooks, and a HeroUI consent banner.
when_to_use: Displaying a cookie banner or gating third-party scripts and analytics on user consent.
when_not_to_use: For per-tenant retention policies use the backend compliance package; for pure feature flags use @stackra/settings.
